_notes.goal-anchor.py: Pair with stop-gate-review.py — the logger is silent on its own. On macOS/Linux replace %USERPROFILE% with $HOME and 'python' with 'python3'.
_notes.stop-gate-review.py: Needs an LLM: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (default provider) or CLAUDE_QUALITY_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama etc. Unconfigured = silent no-op. On macOS/Linux replace %USERPROFILE% with $HOME and 'python' with 'python3'.
